{"method":"item/started","params":{"item":{"type":"exitedReviewMode","id":"019dd6fe-485f-7f73-bf6e-16ff7911fadb","review":"The patch can lose pending steer drafts in realistic active-turn races. These are user-visible correctness issues in the new queuing/steering flow.

Full review comments:

- [P2] Only clear steer after it has actually been sent — /Users/huntharo/github/PwrAgnt/.worktrees/launchpad-pwragnt-main-moit6ddw/apps/desktop/src/renderer/src/features/composer/Composer.tsx:618-622
  When a pending steer is waiting for the next injection opportunity, any `item/completed` whose params happen to contain the draft text clears `pendingSteer` before `submitPendingSteer` marks it as `steering`. For short/common steer text, this can hide and lose the draft; if the subsequent `steerTurn` call fails, the catch path cannot restore it because the pending state was already set to `undefined`. Gate this confirmation on `pendingSteer.status === "steering"` so pre-injection events cannot acknowledge the steer.

- [P2] Preserve pending steer when a queued turn already exists — /Users/huntharo/github/PwrAgnt/.worktrees/launchpad-pwragnt-main-moit6ddw/apps/desktop/src/renderer/src/features/composer/Composer.tsx:660-667
  If the user has one queued message and also creates a pending steer, then the active turn completes before the steer is injected, this branch drops the pending steer because `setQueuedTurn((queued) => queued ?? pendingSteer)` keeps the existing queued message and `setPendingSteer(undefined)` removes the other draft. That loses user-entered text in a normal race near turn completion; instead keep the pending steer visible, restore it to the draft, or otherwise preserve it when a queued turn is already present."},"threadId":"019dd4ce-4fec-76c0-8ede-5e65d7377417","turnId":"019dd6fe-485f-7f73-bf6e-16ff7911fadb"}}

{"method":"item/completed","params":{"item":{"type":"exitedReviewMode","id":"019dd6fe-485f-7f73-bf6e-16ff7911fadb","review":"The patch can lose pending steer drafts in realistic active-turn races. These are user-visible correctness issues in the new queuing/steering flow.

Full review comments:

- [P2] Only clear steer after it has actually been sent — /Users/huntharo/github/PwrAgnt/.worktrees/launchpad-pwragnt-main-moit6ddw/apps/desktop/src/renderer/src/features/composer/Composer.tsx:618-622
  When a pending steer is waiting for the next injection opportunity, any `item/completed` whose params happen to contain the draft text clears `pendingSteer` before `submitPendingSteer` marks it as `steering`. For short/common steer text, this can hide and lose the draft; if the subsequent `steerTurn` call fails, the catch path cannot restore it because the pending state was already set to `undefined`. Gate this confirmation on `pendingSteer.status === "steering"` so pre-injection events cannot acknowledge the steer.

- [P2] Preserve pending steer when a queued turn already exists — /Users/huntharo/github/PwrAgnt/.worktrees/launchpad-pwragnt-main-moit6ddw/apps/desktop/src/renderer/src/features/composer/Composer.tsx:660-667
  If the user has one queued message and also creates a pending steer, then the active turn completes before the steer is injected, this branch drops the pending steer because `setQueuedTurn((queued) => queued ?? pendingSteer)` keeps the existing queued message and `setPendingSteer(undefined)` removes the other draft. That loses user-entered text in a normal race near turn completion; instead keep the pending steer visible, restore it to the draft, or otherwise preserve it when a queued turn is already present."},"threadId":"019dd4ce-4fec-76c0-8ede-5e65d7377417","turnId":"019dd6fe-485f-7f73-bf6e-16ff7911fadb"}}

{"method":"item/started","params":{"item":{"type":"agentMessage","id":"review_rollout_assistant","text":"The patch can lose pending steer drafts in realistic active-turn races. These are user-visible correctness issues in the new queuing/steering flow.

Full review comments:

- [P2] Only clear steer after it has actually been sent — /Users/huntharo/github/PwrAgnt/.worktrees/launchpad-pwragnt-main-moit6ddw/apps/desktop/src/renderer/src/features/composer/Composer.tsx:618-622
  When a pending steer is waiting for the next injection opportunity, any `item/completed` whose params happen to contain the draft text clears `pendingSteer` before `submitPendingSteer` marks it as `steering`. For short/common steer text, this can hide and lose the draft; if the subsequent `steerTurn` call fails, the catch path cannot restore it because the pending state was already set to `undefined`. Gate this confirmation on `pendingSteer.status === "steering"` so pre-injection events cannot acknowledge the steer.

- [P2] Preserve pending steer when a queued turn already exists — /Users/huntharo/github/PwrAgnt/.worktrees/launchpad-pwragnt-main-moit6ddw/apps/desktop/src/renderer/src/features/composer/Composer.tsx:660-667
  If the user has one queued message and also creates a pending steer, then the active turn completes before the steer is injected, this branch drops the pending steer because `setQueuedTurn((queued) => queued ?? pendingSteer)` keeps the existing queued message and `setPendingSteer(undefined)` removes the other draft. That loses user-entered text in a normal race near turn completion; instead keep the pending steer visible, restore it to the draft, or otherwise preserve it when a queued turn is already present.","phase":null,"memoryCitation":null},"threadId":"019dd4ce-4fec-76c0-8ede-5e65d7377417","turnId":"019dd6fe-485f-7f73-bf6e-16ff7911fadb"}}

That loses user-entered text in a normal race near turn completion; instead keep the pending steer visible, restore it to the draft, or otherwise preserve it when a queued turn is already present.","phase":null,"memoryCitation":null},"threadId":"019dd4ce-4fec-76c0-8ede-5e65d7377417","turnId":"019dd6fe-485f-7f73-bf6e-16ff7911fadb"}}
